description: Style Note A relaxed pair of trousers is a wardrobe essential for the man who wants more choices in his casual wardrobe. If you're bored of wearing jeans, then these black chinos from denizen are just right to wear on a date or for an easy weekend look. Pair it with a casual shirt for the right effect. Product Details Black chinos, buttoned and zipped closure, belt loops around the waist, two insert pockets in front, brand patch on the waistband at the back and two welt pockets at the back Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Do not bleach or dry clean Use hot iron Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
